compatibility.contract: sync-native HTTP, SQLite transactions, wake, permissions, query lifecycle
sync-wasm representation and the local Durable Object host boundary
Named-query results and randomized incremental behavior against Zero 1.7.0

suites.name: Deterministic Rust core
suites.whatItProves: No CI-qualified claim is published yet. When green, this suite covers cookies, patches, mutation IDs, retention, query membership, permissions, and model invariants at the recorded SHA.
suites.whatItDoesNotProve: It does not prove HTTP host lifecycle, workerd behavior, production capacity, or application-specific schemas and policies.

suites.name: Native host qualification
suites.whatItProves: No CI-qualified claim is published yet. When green, this suite exercises the release native binary through real Zero clients, concurrent clients, permissions, wake, and query lifecycle.
suites.whatItDoesNotProve: It does not prove the Cloudflare host, multi-region behavior, unbounded namespace sizes, or a consumer's recovery objectives.

suites.name: WASM / workerd qualification
suites.whatItProves: No CI-qualified claim is published yet. When green, this suite covers WASM value boundaries, local Durable Object SQLite transactions, ingest, restart, push-memory soak, protocol fuzz, recovery faults, backup/restore, and generated lifecycle transitions under the pinned workerd.
suites.whatItDoesNotProve: Local workerd is not the Cloudflare production service and does not establish isolate memory, regional propagation, quota, or eviction behavior in a deployed account.

suites.name: Native fault and lifecycle qualification
suites.operationUnit: protocol cases and generated lifecycle steps
suites.whatItProves: No CI-qualified claim is published yet. When green, this suite covers pinned upstream corpus agreement, malformed protocol input, reconnect/retention, process eviction, transactional storage faults, backup/restore, and generated lifecycle transitions on the native host.
suites.whatItDoesNotProve: Injected faults cover named boundaries and generated traces, not every operating-system, filesystem, hardware, or application failure mode.

suites.name: Stock-Zero differential
suites.whatItProves: No CI-qualified claim is published yet. When green, named and seeded query scenarios produce the same observable results as the pinned stock Zero server for the exercised corpus.
suites.whatItDoesNotProve: Differential agreement is limited to the recorded corpus and Zero version; it is not a claim of internal implementation equivalence or future-version compatibility.

knownLimitations: There is no all-green main-branch CI run for the current evidence gate yet, so this fallback JSON makes no verified-build claim.
The workerd lane is local emulation; deployed Cloudflare isolate memory, quota, eviction, and regional propagation require a separate named deployment qualification.
The compatibility corpus is pinned to Zero 1.7.0 and does not imply compatibility with later Zero releases.
GitHub Actions logs and artifacts are immutable per run but remain subject to the repository's retention policy.

unresolvedLanes.name: Main-branch release gate
unresolvedLanes.detail: The latest observed CI run failed in native integration; the gate correctly refuses to publish a verified ledger.

unresolvedLanes.name: Deployed Cloudflare qualification
unresolvedLanes.detail: The deployed rust-cf query differential and platform-specific soak remain outside the standard CI gate.

gate.policy: CI records exact-SHA candidate evidence after every required job succeeds. It publishes a verified release only when the tested build SHA also equals the immutable release-tag SHA; other main-branch builds remain explicitly unverified.
